creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Email sent to freebsd-current@ around twenty-five minutes ago: 

> Directory 1002/ missing from /var/run/user/

Message-ID: <ba0acfe5-b6d0-dbb5-3134-e4de7bc99f5a@freebsd.org>
Date: Sun, 11 Jun 2023 18:51:06 +0100


That one is not archived at <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-June/> (a more recent email _is_ archived), and there's nothing in my Inbox to indicate rejection.
